archetype: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) with Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) and Luxury Accents

brand.name: Pehli Kilkari
brand.description: Premium 3D e-commerce website for Baby & Kids Products. Soft, modern, trustworthy, parent-friendly, colourful but elegant.
brand.vibe: Luxurious yet approachable, soft, playful, magical, and highly trustworthy.

typography.reasoning: Outfit provides a premium, clean geometric look suitable for a high-end luxury brand (like Carter's or high-end Shopify), while Quicksand brings a softness, roundness, and friendliness perfect for baby products. Avoids overused generic fonts.

scales.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-[4rem] font-medium tracking-tight leading-tight
scales.small_label: text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-bold text-[#57534E]

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Optical Alignment, Airy Layouts, High-End Margins

grids.product_grid: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-x-8 gap-y-12

surface_strategies.glassmorphism: bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/60 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.03)] saturate-150
surface_strategies.cards: bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)] hover:shadow-[0_12px_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.06)] transition-all duration-500 border border-transparent hover:border-[#F2E8FF]
surface_strategies.nav_header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#FFF8F0]/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#1C1917]/5

components.hero: Split layout or asymmetric bento. Left: Typography (Outfit) & Primary CTA. Right: 3D interactive `<Canvas>` using @react-three/fiber of a premium baby gift box opening. Floating products/particles (using `<Float>` from @react-three/drei).
components.buttons: Primary: bg-[#FFE6F0] text-[#1C1917] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold shadow-sm hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-md transition-all. Secondary: glassmorphism rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold border-white/50.
components.product_card: Image wrapper with aspect-[4/5] object-cover overflow-hidden rounded-t-3xl. Hover: image scales 1.05. Content padding p-6. Minimalist, title left-aligned, price right-aligned. Floating 'Quick Add' icon button appears on hover over the image bottom-right corner.
components.categories_carousel: Smooth horizontal scrolling. Circular or highly rounded cards for categories (Baby Caps, Socks, Sleeping Bags) with pastel background fills (#DFF4FF, #FFE6F0, etc.).
components.trust_badges: Minimalist lucide-react icons (Shield, Heart, Truck) inside pastel rounded squares. Neutral text tone (#57534E) to balance the colorful pastels.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Smooth scrolling via Lenis for a premium momentum feel.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Interactive hover effects: subtle lift (`-translate-y-2`) and scale for products, button shadow expansion.
motion_and_interactions.3d_elements: Parallax scrolling on background geometric shapes. Floating animations for heroes and section transitions.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Framer Motion staggered fade-ups for text blocks and product cards (`initial={{opacity:0, y:30}}`).

image_urls.description: Premium baby gift box on white fabric
Toddler playing with red striped ball
Baby in premium pastel pink clothes
Child playing with premium wooden toys

testing.required_attributes: All interactive elements, forms, links, buttons, and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="add-to-cart-button"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use @react-three/fiber and @react-three/drei for the 3D Hero section (gift box animation) and floating products.
Use framer-motion for scroll-triggered staggered text entrances and card hovers.
Apply strict glassmorphism only where content scrolls behind (Nav) or on floating widgets (Cart popup).
Always tint grays and shadows with the primary background color (#FFF8F0) to avoid muddy visuals.
Prioritize accessibility: use #1C1917 (Stone 900) for text on pastel backgrounds to ensure readable contrast.
Map user-specified categories to the UI carousel/bento layouts clearly.
Do NOT use HTML `<select>` or native date pickers. Use shadcn/ui DropdownMenu/Select elements and customize their borders and radii to match our rounded-3xl/rounded-full scale.
